data.name: Morningdew Farms: A Gay Farming Game
data.detailed_description:
Sweet southern boy Cody always dreamed of living off the land. Now he's taken over his granddaddy's farm and can begin a wonderful new life in the village of Morningdew--a notorious Gayborhood! Loaded with interactive farming and sizzling gay romance!



Cody will need to work hard to earn money. Once he has enough cash he can upgrade his house and marry one of Morningdew's hot bachelors. In the meantime he'll be getting to know his neighbors, REALLY WELL, and will find the man he wants to spend the rest of his life with.



Part farming game, part gay 'adults-only' visual novel, Morningdew Farms has everything for gay romance lovers and farm game enthusiasts! This hardcore adult game comes from the makers of To Trust an Incubus, so you know it will deliver the goods!



In Morningdew Farms you plant, harvest, raise chickens, sell goods, and earn money so you can advance through the romantic goals of the game. Let's face it, your run-down shack isn't a proper home to start a marriage in. Furnish the place and renovate, then you'll be in the perfect position to land a husband.

With seven bachelors, including a threesome marriage option, you'll have dozens of scenes with potential husbands. Eventually you'll pick the man you want to go exclusive with. See if you can charm him so he wants to stay with you forever!



This hardcore adult game comes from the makers of To Trust an Incubus, so you know it will deliver the goods!



Cody is super excited to finally start farming. The lustful gay hunk picked the perfect village to start his new life. Morningdew is a total Gayborhood!



Cody is lucky to have his big sister living right next door to his farm. She'll give him tips and spot him some money for his first week. Sis is steering Cody toward some of the local hunks so he can settle down and find a husband.



Cody will need to buy supplies at the Country Store, owned and operated by Butch! This hardcore prepper and male dom takes an immediate interest in Morningdew's spunky new farmer!



When Cody is ready to add some animals to his farm, he can get them from his adorable neighbor Jace. Sweetheart Jace loves animals and is a member of a cult! Wait... what?



If Cody wants to land himself a husband he'll need to renovate his beat-up shack. Luckily, the badass builder Rusty can do the work for him. Rusty hides a secret behind his manly exterior! Maybe Cody will find out what it is?



Sanjay wants to grow grapes to start his own wine label, and Cody's farm has the perfect conditions! Can this upscale man work with a down-to-earth country boy? And will sexiness ensue if he does?



Cody was warned to stay out of the woods, but can he resist the sultry call of the hillbilly? What will happen if he dares to trespass? Did I just hear a banjo?



As Morningdew Village's only cryptid (cryptids are things like Bigfoot and the Loch Ness Monster) Nuzzler must be careful about who he trusts. He lives in isolation with only his love of cooking to pass the time. Will he reveal himself to Cody?

data.short_description: Sweet southern boy Cody always dreamed of living off the land. Now he's taken over his granddaddy's farm and can begin a wonderful new life in the village of Morningdew--a notorious Gayborhood! Loaded with interactive farming and sizzling gay romance!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言
data.reviews:
“A pleasant surprise was how well developed the player's avatar character Cody is. In a number of dating games the main character is sometimes kept as a blank slate but Cody is far from this. In one story path he gives some explanation as to why he wanted to take on his grandfather's old farm and is quite forthcoming about his own personal drawbacks while overlooking his personal strengths. This insight into his personality gives him a very engaging quality and I found him becoming quite intrigued with him as a character as much as any of his love interests.”
Magnus Alexander, Magnus Plays

“...damn I loved the bathhouse time! One other thing I will praise is the humor in this demo, if you love your humor adorably cheesy and full of puns you will be smiling the whole was through like how was.”
Yaoi Playground

“Part farming game, part gay ‘adults-only’ visual novel, Morningdew Farms has everything for gay romance lovers and farm game enthusiasts!”
Gayming Magazine

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP System Pack 1 or Newer
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6+ or Newer
  • 處理器: 1 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64 or Newer
  • 處理器: 1 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
